name: test_copy_message_to_clipboard
description:
TC-CHAT-008: Copy message to clipboard.

        Sends a message first, then verifies the copy button works and
        the copied content matches the actual message text.
descriptionHtml:
TC-CHAT-008: Copy message to clipboard.

    Sends a message first, then verifies the copy button works and
    the copied content matches the actual message text.
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Clipboard content does not match message text (after markdown normalization).
  Clipboard (normalized): I'm ready to help you! However, I don't see a message that you want me to copy. Could you please pro...
  Expected: I'm ready to help you! However, I don't see a message that you want me to copy. Could you please pro...
assert "I'm ready to help you! However, I don't see a message that you want me to copy. Could you please provide the message or text that you'd like me to work with?

Once you share it, I can help you with:
Copying/duplicating content
Formatting it
Saving it to a file
Modifying it
Or any other operation you need

Please go ahead and share the message you'd like me to copy!" == "I'm ready to help you! However, I don't see a message that you want me to copy. Could you please provide the message or text that you'd like me to work with?
Once you share it, I can help you with:
Copying/duplicating content
Formatting it
Saving it to a file
Modifying it
Or any other operation you need
Please go ahead and share the message you'd like me to copy!"
  
    I'm ready to help you! However, I don't see a message that you want me to copy. Could you please provide the message or text that you'd like me to work with?
  + 
    Once you share it, I can help you with:
    Copying/duplicating content
    Formatting it
    Saving it to a file
    Modifying it
    Or any other operation you need
  + 
    Please go ahead and share the message you'd like me to copy!
statusTrace:
tests/ui/chat/test_chat_interface.py:220: in test_copy_message_to_clipboard
    assert _strip_markdown(clipboard_text) == ai_response_text.strip(), (
E   AssertionError: Clipboard content does not match message text (after markdown normalization).
E     Clipboard (normalized): I'm ready to help you! However, I don't see a message that you want me to copy. Could you please pro...
E     Expected: I'm ready to help you! However, I don't see a message that you want me to copy. Could you please pro...
E   assert "I'm ready to help you! However, I don't see a message that you want me to copy. Could you please provide the message or text that you'd like me to work with?\n\nOnce you share it, I can help you with:\nCopying/duplicating content\nFormatting it\nSaving it to a file\nModifying it\nOr any other operation you need\n\nPlease go ahead and share the message you'd like me to copy!" == "I'm ready to help you! However, I don't see a message that you want me to copy. Could you please provide the message or text that you'd like me to work with?\nOnce you share it, I can help you with:\nCopying/duplicating content\nFormatting it\nSaving it to a file\nModifying it\nOr any other operation you need\nPlease go ahead and share the message you'd like me to copy!"

E     +
